title: Verify 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access' button pauses the trial
description: Test the secondary action on the Loss Aversion pop-up to confirm trial pause.
preconditions: The 'Pause Trial' Loss Aversion pop-up is open

steps.description: 2. On the pop-up, click the 'Pause Anyway & Lose Access' button.

expected_result: The user's trial is set to a 'Paused' state. The 'pause-clicked' event is fired.
